fields.name: Headline
fields.default: We built our business on customer service

fields.name: Description
fields.default: At the beginning at least, but then we realized we could make a lot more money if we kinda stopped caring about that.

default.title: Free shipping
default.description: It's not actually free we just price it into the products. Someone's paying for it, and it's not us.

default.title: 10-year warranty
default.description: If it breaks in the first 10 years we'll replace it. After that you're on your own though.

default.title: Exchanges
default.description: If you don't like it, trade it to one of your friends for something of theirs.
